changelog: AI: Prompturi rescrise complet — rol epidemiolog senior + audienta (Manager/Director/ANMCS) + cadru structurat (constatari/cauze/recomandari/indicatori) + ton formal-clinic
AI: Repere benchmark adaugate — ECDC PPS (HAI 5.5-7.1%, AMU 30-35%), INSP (MRSA ~50%, CAR-NS Klebsiella ~40%), ESAC-Net (DDD ~360/1000 zile-pac.), OMS AWaRe ≥60%
AI: Reguli anti-inventie date — „daca datele sunt insuficiente, spune explicit, nu inventa
AI: Bilingv complet — prompturi adaptate RO/EN
UX: Progres in 3 pasi la generare AI (Colectez date → Apelez AI → Generez Word)
